matching_contract.negative_filter: If any negative_term of the matched category is present in the same normalized field, ignore that category for this input.

categories.label: BANK_TRANSFER_FEE

categories.label: LOAN_INTEREST
categories.notes: Loan interest / interest expense. Transaction-type category.

categories.label: FINANCIAL_OPERATION_AMBIGUOUS
categories.notes: Ambiguous financial operations (withdrawal/deposit/repayment/transfer) intended for mandatory human review. Keep weight low to avoid overriding clearer categories.
